response.justification: Bogdan is a genuinely strong generalist engineer with nearly two decades of full-stack experience, staff-level titles, and directly relevant MCP/agentic-tooling work at re:cinq — but the role's core requirement is 8+ years shipping production AI solutions, and his AI-specific experience spans roughly one year. There is no evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, evaluation pipelines, or Python, all central to this position. He would be a compelling candidate for a staff full-stack role, but not for a staff GenAI forward-deployed engineer.
strengths: Current hands-on experience with MCP code generators and agentic-workflow frameworks, a named key technology for the role
Nearly 20 years of broad production engineering (web, mobile, embedded, low-latency micro-services) with strong TypeScript/Node depth
Proven customer-facing, mentoring, and knowledge-sharing track record (consulting, workshops, conference talks, courses)
concerns: Falls far short of the required 8+ years building AI-driven solutions — AI-related work only began in 2025
No demonstrated RAG, vector-database, LLM evaluation, or observability experience
Python absent from skills and employment history; cloud experience appears limited to AWS CDK usage rather than designing AI systems on cloud platforms
